description: Gordano Model Flying Club is an active model flying club offering members events, news, calendars, gallery and community activities for RC enthusiasts in Gordano and beyond.

pages.title: Gordano Model Flying Club | Calendar
pages.description: View upcoming events, flying days, and club activities on the Gordano Model Flying Club calendar. Stay up to date with everything happening at our flying field in the Gordano Valley.

pages.title: Gordano Model Flying Club | News
pages.description: Read the latest news, updates, and announcements from Gordano Model Flying Club. Stay informed on club activities, events, and happenings at our flying field

pages.title: Gordano Model Flying Club | Gallery
pages.description: Browse photos from Gordano Model Flying Club's 2026 gallery, showcasing members' RC planes, helicopters, and flying days at our field.

pages.title: Gordano Model Flying Club | About Us
pages.description: Learn about Gordano Model Flying Club, an RC flying club with its own field in the Gordano Valley between Portishead and Clevedon. Affiliated with the BMFA, members can fly year-round in daylight hours

pages.title: Gordano Model Flying Club | History
pages.description: Discover the history of Gordano Model Flying Club, from its origins to today. Learn how the club established its flying field in the Gordano Valley between Portishead and Clevedon

pages.title: Gordano Model Flying Club | Flying Guide
keywords: Gordano Model Flying Club flying guide
pages.description: Read the Gordano Model Flying Club flying guide, covering rules, safety procedures, and best practice for flying RC planes and helicopters at our field in the Gordano Valley.

keywords: Gordano Model Flying Club flying rules
pages.description: View the official flying rules for Gordano Model Flying Club, covering safe operation of RC planes and helicopters at our field in the Gordano Valley between Portishead and Clevedon.

pages.description: Thinking of joining Gordano Model Flying Club? Find out what to expect as a prospective member, how to get started, and how to fly RC planes and helicopters at our field in the Gordano Valley.

pages.description: Discover how Gordano Model Flying Club cares for the wildlife and natural environment surrounding its flying field in the Gordano Valley, balancing RC flying with conservation.
